name: Dutch Oven-- Nine Mile Stew
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat enough oil in the oven to cover the bottom.
2. Sear the meat.
3. Add the stew seasoning and stir.
4. Add the onions and cook on 12 coals, covered with 6 coals for about 20-30 minutes.
5. Layer from bottom to top: potatoes, carrots, celery, green peppers, zucchini.
6. Cook until vegetables are done but still crispy (7-8 coals).
7. Add sausage on top and cook an additional 15 minutes.
8. Sprinkle cheese over the top and serve when melted.
This is not a precise recipe. Feel free to add or remove items and adjust amounts according to taste, ensuring that more time-consuming vegetables are placed at lower levels. Do not add liquid; sufficient cooking liquid will develop from the meat and vegetables.
